zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Nicholas Wadham於1472年出生在英國戴文時，他的父親John Wadham43歲，母親Elizabeth Stucley39歲。他於1472年8月與Jane Stourton結婚。他於1529年被列為member of parliament。他去世於1542年3月5日在英國享年70歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特易爾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Nicholas Wadham于1472年出生在英国戴文时，他的父亲John Wadham43岁，母亲Elizabeth Stucley39岁。他于1472年8月与Jane Stourton结婚。他于1529年被列为member of parliament。他去世于1542年3月5日在英国享年70岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特易爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: Wadham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Wadham in Knowstone (Devon).

variants.name: Waddams
meanings: English: variant of Wadham with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Wadhams
meanings: English: variant of Wadham, with post-medieval excrescent -s, a habitational name from Wadham in Knowstone (Devon). The placename derives from the Old English personal name Wada or Old English wād ‘woad’ + hām ‘village, homestead’ or hamm ‘water meadow’. Wadham College, Oxford, was founded in 1610 by Dorothy Wadham, widow of Nicholas Wadham (died 1609), a wealthy Somerset landowner.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Nicholas Wadham was born in 1472, in Devon, England, his father, John Wadham, was 43 and his mother, Elizabeth Stucley, was 39. He married Jane Stourton in August 1472. In 1529, his occupation is listed as member of parliament. He died on 5 March 1542, in England, at the age of 70, and was buried in Ilton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Nicholas Wadham est né en 1472, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, John Wadham, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Stucley, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Jane Stourton en août 1472. En 1529, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament. Il est décédé le 5 mars 1542, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Ilton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Nicholas Wadham 1472 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Wadham 43 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Stucley 39. Er hat im August 1472 Jane Stourton geheiratet. 1529 ist sein Beruf als member of parliament aufgeführt. Er starb am 5. März 1542 im Alter von 70 Jahren in England und wurde in Ilton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas Wadham è nato il nel 1472 nel Devon, England, il suo padre, John Wadham, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Stucley, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Jane Stourton nel agosto 1472. Nel 1529, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament. Morì il 5 marzo 1542, nel England, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Ilton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Wadhamが1472年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父John Wadhamは43歳，母Elizabeth Stucleyは39歳であった。1472年8月にJane Stourtonと結婚した。1529年，職業はmember of parliamentと記録されている。彼は1542年3月5日にイギリスで70歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトイルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas Wadham(이)가 1472년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Wadham(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Stucley(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1472년 8월 Jane Stourton(와)과 결혼했다. 1529년, 그의 직업은 member of parliament이었다. 그는 1542년 3월 5일 영국에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 이턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas Wadham nasceu em 1472, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Wadham, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Stucley, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Stourton em agosto de 1472. Em 1529, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament. Ele faleceu em 5 de março de 1542, em Inglaterra, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Ilton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Nicholas Wadham родился в 1472 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени John Wadham было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Stucley, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Stourton август 1472 г. В 1529 году он работал по профессии member of parliament. Он умер 5 марта 1542 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности илтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

Murió el 5 de marzo de 1542, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Ilton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
